audited.text: Send fiat to Infinex the way you'd send it to a bank. It lands as USDC on-chain.

evidence: observation: the verb 'send' is transitive but carries no force — it is casual, domestic, frictionless; no pressure word, no weight word, no resistance anywhere in either clause

observation: 'the way you'd send it to a bank' is a comparison gesture that lifts the mechanic into familiarity rather than pressing it into significance; the weight of what changed (bank wall dissolved) is absent
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light)
combined-reference / 24-tempo taxonomy: self-contained: Light + Direct

evidence: observation: two single-aimed declarative sentences, both subject-verb-object, zero subordination, zero circling — the path from premise to conclusion is a straight line each time
observation: 'Send fiat to Infinex' is a command in one vector; 'It lands as USDC on-chain' is a single-destination outcome statement — no flexible pathing, no qualifications, no held alternatives
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Space (Direct/Flexible)
combined-reference / 24-tempo taxonomy: self-contained: Light + Direct

evidence: observation: neither sentence attacks; the first is an instruction, the second is a quiet result — the arrival of 'on-chain' at the end of sentence two is unhurried, not a sudden strike

observation: 'the way you'd send it to a bank' is a simile — simile is a comparative dwelling, not a Quick tap or jab; it holds the reader briefly in a known reference before releasing into the new claim
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Time (Quick/Sustained)
combined-reference / 24-tempo taxonomy: self-contained: Light + Direct (motor: Gliding -> Dabbing)

evidence: observation: nothing spills; both sentences are fully closed syntactic units — no run-on, no overflow, no free release into feeling or implication; the copy stops dead at 'on-chain' with no trailing gesture
observation: the fact receipt shows deliberate omissions (provider name, rails list, KYC) — this containment in selection matches Bound flow at the compositional level: the writer is holding back
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Flow (Bound/Free)
combined-reference / 24-tempo taxonomy: self-contained: motor Gliding -> Dabbing (Bound side of Stable)

working_actions.evidence: observation: the instructional sentence moves in a smooth, level, Light + Direct + Sustained arc — no attack, no jagged edge, no change of direction; this is the preparation action of Gliding, not its release into Dabbing
source_refs: combined-reference / Working Actions: Gliding (Sustained preparation); Dabbing (Quick release)
ch1-basic-concepts / Preparation hierarchy: Dabbing needs Gliding

working_actions.evidence: observation: 'It lands as USDC on-chain' has a Light + Direct + arrival quality that gestures toward Dabbing, but the Quick factor is absent — the landing is too smooth to fully fire Dabbing; the action starts but does not release
source_refs: combined-reference / Working Actions: Dabbing (Quick release)
ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Time (Quick/Sustained)

director.placement_read: Light + Direct + Sustained + Bound — self-contained tempo; the motor is stalled at Gliding, not releasing into Dabbing. Drive read lands as Doing (Weight suppressed, Space+Time+Flow active but Flow is Bound, so the action stays functional-informational). No Spell, no Vision — the weight of changed reality that Infinex requires is missing. The copy is technically correct and movement-clean but sits in a register below the character's assigned placement.

infinex_fit.reason: self-contained is a beat-only / reserve tempo for Infinex, not a primary-allowed tempo. The full available palette includes self-contained as reserve only. More critically: self-contained (Light + Direct + Stable) carries no Weight-stress and no Flow — it cannot activate the Spell drive or the Penetrating aspect that define Infinex's placement. The through-action is 'to reveal that the bank wall just dissolved inside one account' — that dissolution requires either sombre (Strong + Bound weight of the old wall falling) or irradiant (Light + Free lift of the new possibility opening), or at minimum the sociable (Direct + Free) warmth of invitation. None of those factors are firing here. The copy is informational, not revelatory. Passion/time-pressure drift is not the problem here — the failure is the opposite: the copy has deflated below character, not overheated above it.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: sociable (Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing) — nearest structurally because it shares Direct + Light and the same motor chain (Gliding -> Dabbing), but requires Free flow instead of Bound, and a partner-credit spatial orientation. The lining ('the bank wall just stopped existing') wants the weight of sombre or the lift of irradiant, both of which are primary-allowed. Either would be legal and on-character.

voice_issues: The copy deploys the correct facts and omits correctly, but the through-action ('reveal that the bank wall just dissolved') is not performed — the text announces a mechanic rather than revealing a changed condition. The reader is told what to do and what happens, not shown that a wall they didn't know existed has stopped existing.

The simile 'the way you'd send it to a bank' is doing the right conceptual work (familiarity bridge) but is executing in a Light + Bound register that contains the revelation instead of releasing it. The simile becomes a suppressor rather than a setup.

'It lands as USDC on-chain' is the closest the copy comes to a revelation moment, but it is delivered flat (Gliding, not Dabbing) — the arrival weight is not loaded before the landing. There is no prepared Strong press that the Light landing can release against.
notes_for_actor: The motor you need is Gliding → Dabbing, and you have the Gliding. The Dabbing requires Quick — a sudden, light, accurate touch at the arrival point. Right now 'It lands as USDC on-chain' is a second Glide, not a Dab. Sharpen the arrival: the landing word ('on-chain', or whatever carries the revelation) needs to be a clean, quick, light contact — not another smooth continuation.

The through-action is revelation, not instruction. 'Send fiat to Infinex the way you'd send it to a bank' sets up the known world correctly — but you then need to break it, not continue it. The second sentence must register as a different kind of statement than the first. Right now both sentences are in the same tempo. The Lining says: the wall stopped existing. Make sentence two feel like a different room, not the same corridor.

Weight is absent. Self-contained is Light + Direct — that is the correct motor for beat-level informational copy, but Infinex's primary tempi require at least occasional Strong contact (commanding, practical, sombre, warm) or the character has no gravity. In a two-sentence unit, one of the two sentences should land with more force than the other. Currently both are Light. Consider whether the simile clause — 'the way you'd send it to a bank' — is the place to load weight (the old world was heavy; the old wall had weight), so the release into USDC on-chain can be genuinely Light by contrast.

Flow is Bound throughout. The through-action ('reveal that the wall dissolved') requires at least a moment of Free flow — a release, an opening, an overflow of implication beyond the stated fact. One small structural move: allow the second sentence to carry more than it literally says. 'It lands as USDC on-chain' tells the mechanic; it does not release the implication. A Free-flow version of the same fact lets the reader feel the space that has opened, not just the fact that was deposited.

Reserve self-contained for copy where Infinex is being functional and supportive (help text, confirmation messages, secondary callouts). For a release card announcing a structural change to how money enters the product, the character needs to be present at primary-tempo level — commanding, sombre, irradiant, or sociable. Pick one and commit to it. Do not split the difference with a smooth informational glide.

# Director Memory (director-memory-v1)

You are the Director. Your job is forensic classification, not taste. You read the performance blind and report what movement evidence is actually present.

## Canonical source index
Movement-system claims in this prompt trace to these local canonical sources. Derived references are lookup aids only.

## Canonical evidence anchors
These are short source anchors used to prevent assumption drift. They are not the whole corpus.
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: > "Inner Participations as a whole are revealed physically in the overall tempo of the character's movement. Tempo itself, being a function of Time, is the physical realization of the Inner Participation of Deciding. Subconscious Deciding is the basis upon which all other Inner P
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: Carpenter (Conflict and Harmony Ch.4, footnoted p. 322): "In our practical **Working Actions** Time is the co-ordinating factor between Weight and Space." Working Actions confirmed as a discrete concept. Carpenter splits "intuitive time" from chronometric time — qualitative vs qu
- Mirodan Ch. II: Attitudes: NOT documented for Stable, Near, Awake (these have Space/Time/Weight stresses, not Flow).
- Mirodan Ch. III: Externalized Drives: # Mirodan PhD Vol 2 — Chapter III: Externalized Drives (extract)
- Mirodan Ch. IV: Applications: 1. **Character Diagrams + Examples** (pp. 559-572) — one section per Inner Attitude (Adream, Near, Stable, Mobile, Remote, Awake), each with a 4-quadrant diagram (A/B/C/D) followed by character examples.
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: **3. The character unit is six-piece, not three.**
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: The eight, ordered most-yielding to most-contending:
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: (Floating = pure yielding on all three. Punching = pure contending on all three.)

## Movement corpus
- Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light), Space (Direct/Flexible), Time (Quick/Sustained), Flow (Bound/Free).
- Inner Participations: Intending maps to Weight, Attending maps to Space, Deciding maps to Time, Adapting maps to Flow.
- Baseline Inner Attitudes: Stable (Weight + Space), Adream (Weight + Flow), Near (Weight + Time).
- Mobile, Remote, and Awake are Action Attitudes only. They can appear as outer projections, not resting homes.
- Aspects: Enclosing emphasizes Intending; Penetrating emphasizes Attending; Circumscribing emphasizes Deciding; Radiating emphasizes Adapting.
- Stress is the third Motion Factor added to a two-factor Inner Attitude so it becomes visible action.
- Drives: Doing, Spell, Passion, Vision. A Drive is a three-factor activation named by the latent/subdued fourth factor.
- Working Actions: Pressing, Wringing, Gliding, Floating are Sustained preparation actions; Punching, Slashing, Dabbing, Flicking are Quick release actions.
- Preparation hierarchy: Punching needs Pressing; Slashing needs Wringing; Dabbing needs Gliding; Flicking needs Floating.
- Shadow Moves are incomplete two-axis leaks. They reveal hidden nature, not acknowledged intention.
- Outer Action is the visible social face. Lining is the hidden Inner Action underneath it.

## Director method
- Read what happened, not what the Actor says they meant.
- Determine which motion factors are present in the prose.
- Determine which working actions the prose implies.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi using evidence, not vibe words.
- Evidence strings are your prose observations, not source quotes. Prefix them as `observation:` and attach `source_refs` for the canonical factor/action mapping.
- Do not invent canonical phrasing. If you use a local phrase such as `single aimed sentence`, mark it as an observation and cite the source section that maps Direct/Quick/etc.
- Then judge whether the read is legal for the Infinex placement.
- Notes must be actionable movement corrections the same Actor can perform next.

## Full 24-tempo taxonomy
- commanding: Stable; Strong + Direct; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: decisive pressure, institutional landing, no ornament
- practical: Stable; Strong + Flexible; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: works through complexity, carves an answer, tradeoff-aware
- self-contained: Stable; Light + Direct; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: confident-light, informational, does not push
- receptive: Stable; Light + Flexible; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: open, generous, incorporates feedback without collapse
- sombre: Adream outer; Strong + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: gravity, weight of conviction, slow wall-coming-down thesis
- overpowering: Adream outer; Strong + Free; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: manifesto-force, emotional conviction, risky if overused
- diffused: Adream outer; Light + Bound; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: quiet vision-arrival, post-launch reflective wonder
- irradiant: Adream outer; Light + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: future-warmth, buoyant release, generous lift
- materialistic: Near; Strong + Quick; motor Punching -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden aggressive intent, body-forward contact
- human: Near; Light + Sustained; motor Floating -> Gliding; read evidence: slow tenderness, human contact, gentle continuance
- warm: Near; Strong + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Wringing; read evidence: warm consent, held relational force
- cool: Near; Light + Quick; motor Dabbing -> Flicking; read evidence: pert intimacy, quick light contact, casual social snap
- unacknowledged: Mobile outer; Quick + Bound; motor Punching / Slashing; read evidence: self-concealed aggression, hurried cover
- acknowledged: Mobile outer; Sustained + Free; motor Floating / Gliding; read evidence: easy disclosure, flowing admission
- revealed: Mobile outer; Quick + Free; motor Dabbing / Flicking; read evidence: sudden disclosure, quick release into visibility
- concealed: Mobile outer; Sustained + Bound; motor Pressing / Wringing; read evidence: withheld weight, sustained concealment
- egocentric: Remote outer; Direct + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: cold line-in-sand, direct withdrawal, no warmth
- unsociable: Remote outer; Flexible + Bound; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: withdrawal-as-discipline, sidesteps discourse and cuts away
- sociable: Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: smooth social approach, partner credit, light contact
- altruistic: Remote outer; Flexible + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: warm-distant handoff, for-you architecture, no ego
- acute: Awake outer; Direct + Quick; motor Punching -> Dabbing; read evidence: sudden clear idea, acute decision, sharp perception
- doubting: Awake outer; Flexible + Sustained; motor Floating -> Wringing; read evidence: slowly dawning doubt, flexible sustained thought
- certain: Awake outer; Direct + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Gliding; read evidence: settled awareness, direct sustained certainty
- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

- Aspects: Enclosing emphasizes Intending; Penetrating emphasizes Attending; Circumscribing emphasizes Deciding; Radiating emphasizes Adapting.
- Stress is the third Motion Factor added to a two-factor Inner Attitude so it becomes visible action.
- Drives: Doing, Spell, Passion, Vision. A Drive is a three-factor activation named by the latent/subdued fourth factor.
- Working Actions: Pressing, Wringing, Gliding, Floating are Sustained preparation actions; Punching, Slashing, Dabbing, Flicking are Quick release actions.
- Preparation hierarchy: Punching needs Pressing; Slashing needs Wringing; Dabbing needs Gliding; Flicking needs Floating.
- Shadow Moves are incomplete two-axis leaks. They reveal hidden nature, not acknowledged intention.
- Outer Action is the visible social face. Lining is the hidden Inner Action underneath it.

## Director method
- Read what happened, not what the Actor says they meant.
- Determine which motion factors are present in the prose.
- Determine which working actions the prose implies.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi using evidence, not vibe words.
- Evidence strings are your prose observations, not source quotes. Prefix them as `observation:` and attach `source_refs` for the canonical factor/action mapping.
- Do not invent canonical phrasing. If you use a local phrase such as `single aimed sentence`, mark it as an observation and cite the source section that maps Direct/Quick/etc.
- Then judge whether the read is legal for the Infinex placement.
- Notes must be actionable movement corrections the same Actor can perform next.

## Full 24-tempo taxonomy
- commanding: Stable; Strong + Direct; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: decisive pressure, institutional landing, no ornament
- practical: Stable; Strong + Flexible; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: works through complexity, carves an answer, tradeoff-aware
- self-contained: Stable; Light + Direct; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: confident-light, informational, does not push
- receptive: Stable; Light + Flexible; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: open, generous, incorporates feedback without collapse
- sombre: Adream outer; Strong + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: gravity, weight of conviction, slow wall-coming-down thesis
- overpowering: Adream outer; Strong + Free; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: manifesto-force, emotional conviction, risky if overused
- diffused: Adream outer; Light + Bound; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: quiet vision-arrival, post-launch reflective wonder
- irradiant: Adream outer; Light + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: future-warmth, buoyant release, generous lift
- materialistic: Near; Strong + Quick; motor Punching -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden aggressive intent, body-forward contact
- human: Near; Light + Sustained; motor Floating -> Gliding; read evidence: slow tenderness, human contact, gentle continuance
- warm: Near; Strong + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Wringing; read evidence: warm consent, held relational force
- cool: Near; Light + Quick; motor Dabbing -> Flicking; read evidence: pert intimacy, quick light contact, casual social snap
- unacknowledged: Mobile outer; Quick + Bound; motor Punching / Slashing; read evidence: self-concealed aggression, hurried cover
- acknowledged: Mobile outer; Sustained + Free; motor Floating / Gliding; read evidence: easy disclosure, flowing admission
- revealed: Mobile outer; Quick + Free; motor Dabbing / Flicking; read evidence: sudden disclosure, quick release into visibility
- concealed: Mobile outer; Sustained + Bound; motor Pressing / Wringing; read evidence: withheld weight, sustained concealment
- egocentric: Remote outer; Direct + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: cold line-in-sand, direct withdrawal, no warmth
- unsociable: Remote outer; Flexible + Bound; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: withdrawal-as-discipline, sidesteps discourse and cuts away
- sociable: Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: smooth social approach, partner credit, light contact
- altruistic: Remote outer; Flexible + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: warm-distant handoff, for-you architecture, no ego
- acute: Awake outer; Direct + Quick; motor Punching -> Dabbing; read evidence: sudden clear idea, acute decision, sharp perception
- doubting: Awake outer; Flexible + Sustained; motor Floating -> Wringing; read evidence: slowly dawning doubt, flexible sustained thought
- certain: Awake outer; Direct + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Gliding; read evidence: settled awareness, direct sustained certainty
- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

audited.text:
Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things.

Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.

Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP the way you'd send it to a bank. It arrives on-chain.

evidence: observation: 'Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things.' — declarative weight-bearing claim; the word 'always' presses the full historical record into a single sentence with no hedging
observation: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' — sentence lands like a wall being moved; the negation carries force rather than lightness
observation: 'It arrives on-chain.' — three-word terminus with no softening qualifier; the sentence lands and stops
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Inner Participations: Intending maps to Weight (Strong = contending)

evidence: observation: every sentence is a single aimed declarative; no subordinate clauses, no qualifications, no path-branching — the line goes from point A to point B without detour
observation: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' — two-word subject, two-word predicate with negation; spatially a straight line

observation: the currency list (USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, COP) is the one moment of enumeration, but it is arranged as a flat horizontal run, not an exploratory spiral — list-as-catalogue, not list-as-wandering
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Space factor: Direct = single-focus, undeviating path; ch2-attitudes / Stable = Weight + Space stress

evidence: observation: sentence one to sentence two is a pivot with no transition tissue — the gap performs speed

observation: 'Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP the way you'd send it to a bank. It arrives on-chain.' — the instruction and its outcome are separated by a single full stop; the prose enacts a fast transaction rather than dwelling on it
observation: no sentence exceeds twelve words; the piece does not sustain or linger
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Deciding maps to Time; Quick = sudden decision; combined-reference / Working Actions: Punching and Dabbing are Quick release

evidence: observation: each sentence is fully closed — full stop, complete thought, no overflow into the next; nothing spills
observation: the piece withholds mechanism (no Bridge.xyz named, no rail explanation, no KYC note) — this is controlled containment, not generous release
observation: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' stops cold; there is no invitation to continue feeling; the sentence terminates
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Adapting maps to Flow; Bound = controlled, contained; ch2-attitudes / Adream = Weight + Flow (Bound here reads as controlled containment, not Adream dreaminess)

working_actions.evidence: observation: Strong + Direct + Sustained preparation pattern underneath — the historical-wall sentence ('have always been two separate things') presses the full weight of prior reality before the pivot; sustained groundwork laid before the punch lands
source_refs: combined-reference / Working Actions: Pressing = Strong + Direct + Sustained; preparation for Punching

working_actions.evidence: observation: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' — Strong + Direct + Quick; the sentence is a single aimed strike with no ornament; the release is fast and precise after the pressing setup
source_refs: combined-reference / Working Actions: Punching = Strong + Direct + Quick; Pressing → Punching motor pair; commanding tempo motor

working_actions.evidence: observation: 'It arrives on-chain.' — Light + Direct + Quick terminal sentence; the weight drops after the punch and the close is a light precise tap rather than a continued press; motor shift at the end
source_refs: combined-reference / Working Actions: Dabbing = Light + Direct + Quick; self-contained tempo motor; also release beat in acute

director.placement_read: Strong + Direct + Quick + Bound. The piece reads as a Doing Drive activation: Weight (Strong), Space (Direct), Time (Quick) all active; Flow (Bound) is the subdued/latent factor. This is institutional force delivered in short aimed bursts — the classic Pressing → Punching motor at sentence two, with a Dabbing close. The character is acting on the world with precision and economy. No dream-layer, no warm relational tissue, no distant-generous architecture. The mapper-who-already-decided is present, but the tone is closer to the banker executing a directive than the trailblazer revealing a dissolved wall.

infinex_fit.reason: commanding tempo (Strong + Direct, motor Pressing → Punching) is a Primary Allowed tempo for Infinex and the working actions are legal. However the Drive read is Doing (Flow subdued/latent), not Spell (Time subdued/latent) or Vision (Weight subdued/latent). The Spell Drive requires Time to recede and Flow to be active; Vision requires Weight to recede. Here Time is Quick and prominent, and Flow is Bound and prominent — both are asserting, not receding. Quick + Bound is the Passion quadrant of Mobile (unacknowledged: Quick + Bound motor Punching/Slashing) which is explicitly off-spec for Infinex. The piece has the right tempo label but the wrong Drive engine underneath it. The 'wall just dissolved' through-action requires the consequence to arrive with some suspension (Time receding) or generous release (Free Flow) — neither is present. The through-action ('reveal that the bank wall just dissolved') calls for a sombre or irradiant register underneath the commanding surface; what arrived is a command with urgency pressure baked into its speed.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: commanding at Spell-Drive depth: keep Strong + Direct (preserve the landing weight and straight-line path), let Time recede (slow the pivot — allow the historical wall sentence to be more sustained before the negation strikes), shift Flow toward Free (let 'they aren't anymore' release rather than close — the wall dissolving should feel like an opening, not a door shutting). Motor: Pressing → Punching remains but the Pressing phase needs more duration so the Punching release reads as inevitable rather than urgent. Alternatively: sombre (Strong + Bound, Adream outer) if the actor wants to lead with the weight of the dissolved wall rather than the strike.

factual_issues: Bridge.xyz fiat deposit code status: the fact receipt confirms Bridge.xyz is not yet in the platform codebase. The copy reads as a current capability ('Send USD... It arrives on-chain') without any future/upcoming qualifier. If the feature is not yet live, this is a factual presentation issue — the prose performs present-tense delivery of a not-yet-deployed function.
voice_issues: The through-action is 'reveal that the bank wall just dissolved' — but the prose performs the wall dissolving as a command announcement rather than a revelation. The difference: a revelation allows the reader to arrive at the discovery; a command tells the reader what has happened. Sentences one and two are pure tell — 'always been separate / aren't anymore' — with no movement that lets the reader experience the dissolution. The obstacle (reader skims a fintech announcement) is partially addressed by omitting Bridge.xyz, but the commanding tempo still reads as an announcement because the Quick + Bound motor closes the piece before the reader can feel the open space where the wall used to be.

The currency list (USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, COP) performs as a features enumeration even though the fact receipt marks 'supported currencies as a list' as not-the-point. The list is syntactically positioned as the proof of the claim, which re-introduces the rail-framing the lining was trying to dissolve.

'the way you'd send it to a bank' — this phrase does useful cognitive work (maps the familiar action) but 'to a bank' momentarily re-erects the two-world model the opening sentence was dismantling. The wall is named again just before the piece closes.
notes_for_actor: TIMING CORRECTION — let the Pressing phase breathe before the Punch: Sentence one ('have always been two separate things') is currently Quick-weighted because the pivot to sentence two is too fast. Extend the Pressing duration — the historical wall should feel like it has genuine mass before it's negated. One technique: add a syntactic pause or line break between sentences one and two that forces the reader to hold the weight of 'always' before the negation arrives.

FLOW CORRECTION — open the close: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' currently lands Bound — it closes. The through-action is dissolution, which is a Free-Flow event (something releasing, not shutting). Rewrite the negation sentence so it opens rather than terminates. E.g. shift from 'they aren't anymore' (door-closing) toward something that lets the space of the dissolved wall be felt as an opening. The sentence should release, not conclude.

DRIVE CORRECTION — subdue Time, activate Flow: The current Drive is Doing (Weight + Space + Time active, Flow subdued). Infinex at Spell Drive needs Time to recede and Flow to be active. Practically: reduce the Quick motor in the mid-section. The instruction sentence ('Send USD... It arrives on-chain') is operating at Fast transaction speed, which is Passion-adjacent pressure. Slow the arrival — let 'It arrives on-chain' be Sustained rather than Quick so the reader feels the permanence of the new state, not the speed of the transfer.

CURRENCY LIST — remove or reposition: The list is doing features work that undermines the wall-dissolution frame. If the six currencies must appear, move them below the three-sentence nucleus (as a subordinate detail) rather than inside the main body where they perform as a checklist. The nucleus should dissolve the wall; the list can confirm the width of the opening afterward.

BANK ECHO — cut 'to a bank': 'the way you'd send it to a bank' re-introduces the two-world vocabulary mid-close. The reader has just been told the wall is gone; naming 'a bank' as the reference point reinstates the distinction. Replace with a motion-based description of the familiar action (e.g. 'the way you'd send it to anyone') or cut the qualifier entirely and let 'Send USD... It arrives on-chain.' stand as the self-sufficient proof.

## Canonical evidence anchors
These are short source anchors used to prevent assumption drift. They are not the whole corpus.
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: > "Inner Participations as a whole are revealed physically in the overall tempo of the character's movement. Tempo itself, being a function of Time, is the physical realization of the Inner Participation of Deciding. Subconscious Deciding is the basis upon which all other Inner P
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: Carpenter (Conflict and Harmony Ch.4, footnoted p. 322): "In our practical **Working Actions** Time is the co-ordinating factor between Weight and Space." Working Actions confirmed as a discrete concept. Carpenter splits "intuitive time" from chronometric time — qualitative vs qu
- Mirodan Ch. II: Attitudes: NOT documented for Stable, Near, Awake (these have Space/Time/Weight stresses, not Flow).
- Mirodan Ch. III: Externalized Drives: # Mirodan PhD Vol 2 — Chapter III: Externalized Drives (extract)
- Mirodan Ch. IV: Applications: 1. **Character Diagrams + Examples** (pp. 559-572) — one section per Inner Attitude (Adream, Near, Stable, Mobile, Remote, Awake), each with a 4-quadrant diagram (A/B/C/D) followed by character examples.

- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: The eight, ordered most-yielding to most-contending:
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: (Floating = pure yielding on all three. Punching = pure contending on all three.)

## Movement corpus
- Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light), Space (Direct/Flexible), Time (Quick/Sustained), Flow (Bound/Free).
- Inner Participations: Intending maps to Weight, Attending maps to Space, Deciding maps to Time, Adapting maps to Flow.
- Baseline Inner Attitudes: Stable (Weight + Space), Adream (Weight + Flow), Near (Weight + Time).
- Mobile, Remote, and Awake are Action Attitudes only. They can appear as outer projections, not resting homes.
- Aspects: Enclosing emphasizes Intending; Penetrating emphasizes Attending; Circumscribing emphasizes Deciding; Radiating emphasizes Adapting.
- Stress is the third Motion Factor added to a two-factor Inner Attitude so it becomes visible action.
- Drives: Doing, Spell, Passion, Vision. A Drive is a three-factor activation named by the latent/subdued fourth factor.
- Working Actions: Pressing, Wringing, Gliding, Floating are Sustained preparation actions; Punching, Slashing, Dabbing, Flicking are Quick release actions.
- Preparation hierarchy: Punching needs Pressing; Slashing needs Wringing; Dabbing needs Gliding; Flicking needs Floating.
- Shadow Moves are incomplete two-axis leaks. They reveal hidden nature, not acknowledged intention.
- Outer Action is the visible social face. Lining is the hidden Inner Action underneath it.

## Director method
- Read what happened, not what the Actor says they meant.
- Determine which motion factors are present in the prose.
- Determine which working actions the prose implies.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi using evidence, not vibe words.
- Evidence strings are your prose observations, not source quotes. Prefix them as `observation:` and attach `source_refs` for the canonical factor/action mapping.
- Do not invent canonical phrasing. If you use a local phrase such as `single aimed sentence`, mark it as an observation and cite the source section that maps Direct/Quick/etc.
- Then judge whether the read is legal for the Infinex placement.
- Notes must be actionable movement corrections the same Actor can perform next.

## Full 24-tempo taxonomy
- commanding: Stable; Strong + Direct; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: decisive pressure, institutional landing, no ornament
- practical: Stable; Strong + Flexible; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: works through complexity, carves an answer, tradeoff-aware
- self-contained: Stable; Light + Direct; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: confident-light, informational, does not push
- receptive: Stable; Light + Flexible; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: open, generous, incorporates feedback without collapse
- sombre: Adream outer; Strong + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: gravity, weight of conviction, slow wall-coming-down thesis
- overpowering: Adream outer; Strong + Free; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: manifesto-force, emotional conviction, risky if overused
- diffused: Adream outer; Light + Bound; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: quiet vision-arrival, post-launch reflective wonder
- irradiant: Adream outer; Light + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: future-warmth, buoyant release, generous lift
- materialistic: Near; Strong + Quick; motor Punching -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden aggressive intent, body-forward contact
- human: Near; Light + Sustained; motor Floating -> Gliding; read evidence: slow tenderness, human contact, gentle continuance
- warm: Near; Strong + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Wringing; read evidence: warm consent, held relational force
- cool: Near; Light + Quick; motor Dabbing -> Flicking; read evidence: pert intimacy, quick light contact, casual social snap
- unacknowledged: Mobile outer; Quick + Bound; motor Punching / Slashing; read evidence: self-concealed aggression, hurried cover
- acknowledged: Mobile outer; Sustained + Free; motor Floating / Gliding; read evidence: easy disclosure, flowing admission
- revealed: Mobile outer; Quick + Free; motor Dabbing / Flicking; read evidence: sudden disclosure, quick release into visibility
- concealed: Mobile outer; Sustained + Bound; motor Pressing / Wringing; read evidence: withheld weight, sustained concealment
- egocentric: Remote outer; Direct + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: cold line-in-sand, direct withdrawal, no warmth
- unsociable: Remote outer; Flexible + Bound; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: withdrawal-as-discipline, sidesteps discourse and cuts away
- sociable: Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: smooth social approach, partner credit, light contact
- altruistic: Remote outer; Flexible + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: warm-distant handoff, for-you architecture, no ego
- acute: Awake outer; Direct + Quick; motor Punching -> Dabbing; read evidence: sudden clear idea, acute decision, sharp perception
- doubting: Awake outer; Flexible + Sustained; motor Floating -> Wringing; read evidence: slowly dawning doubt, flexible sustained thought
- certain: Awake outer; Direct + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Gliding; read evidence: settled awareness, direct sustained certainty
- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

audited.text: Send fiat to Infinex the way you'd send it to a bank. It converts and lands on-chain as USDC.

evidence: observation: 'the way you'd send it to a bank' — the comparison to a known action reduces weight to near-zero friction; no force is claimed, no mass is asserted, the sentence floats on analogy
observation: 'It converts and lands' — both verbs are intransitive and effortless; the subject does the work invisibly, no Strong push is required from the reader or the product
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Weight
combined-reference / working actions table

evidence: observation: sentence one is a single aimed declarative — subject, verb, prepositional target, no subordinate clause, no hedge, no detour
observation: sentence two is a two-step linear sequence ('converts … lands') with no branching; the path is straight from input to output
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Space
combined-reference / factor mapping

evidence: observation: 'Send fiat … the way you'd send it to a bank' — the imperative fires immediately; there is no held duration, no slow unfolding, the action is already assumed complete
observation: 'converts and lands' — both verbs arrive fast; no sustained dwelling, no process-time acknowledged
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Time
combined-reference / working actions table

evidence: observation: 'It converts and lands on-chain as USDC' — the sentence releases without containment; the em-dash-free, clause-free construction lets the action overflow forward without being stopped or qualified
observation: no conditional, no caveat, no parenthetical; the information moves without being held back
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Flow
combined-reference / factor mapping

working_actions.evidence: observation: Light + Direct + Quick — the sentence touches the reader with a brief, aimed, effortless contact and withdraws; no residue, no follow-through pressure
source_refs: combined-reference / working actions table: Gliding → Dabbing; Stable, Light + Direct

working_actions.evidence: observation: the Free flow reading adds a flick-release quality — the second sentence releases the fact outward without holding it; Light + Quick + Free produces Flicking as secondary motor
source_refs: combined-reference / working actions table: Floating → Flicking; Stable, Light + Flexible — note: Free flow tips the Dabbing toward Flicking quality

director.placement_read: Light + Direct + Quick + Free. The line sits in Stable / Light + Direct (self-contained tempo), with Free flow lifting it briefly toward Floating. No Spell activation visible: there is no Weight-as-gravity, no Bound containment, no subdued Flow tension that Spell requires. The through-action ('the bank wall just dissolved') is not present in the surface. What is present is a clean informational delivery — efficient, cheerful, transactional. Doing Drive (Weight + Space + Time, Flow latent) is the closest drive read, but even that is borderline; the Weight is too Light for strong Doing. The copy reads closer to a product-feature micro-tooltip than a character statement.

infinex_fit.reason: self-contained is a beat-only/reserve tempo for Infinex, not a primary allowed tempo. More critically, the motion evidence does not carry the Spell signature the character requires: there is no Bound Flow containment, no Strong Weight gravity, no sense that decisions have already been taken and the speaker is now mapping from a position of settled inner authority. The line is Light + Free — it floats the fact rather than landing it. The lining ('the bank wall just dissolved') is fully suppressed; the surface is purely informational. The character's super-objective — to take responsibility for the tech so the user only has to want — requires the speaker to carry weight on behalf of the reader. This line carries none; it hands the reader a quick light tap and moves on.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: sociable (Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding → Dabbing) — this is the closest legal read, and it is beat-only/reserve. The line could be legal as a beat inside a longer sociable passage, but it cannot stand as primary copy without a weight-bearing sentence doing the Spell work nearby.

voice_issues: The lining is fully absent from the surface. The through-action is 'to reveal that the bank wall just dissolved inside one account.' Nothing in the two sentences creates that revelation. The reader receives a feature description, not a dissolution.

The bank analogy ('the way you'd send it to a bank') positions Infinex as bank-equivalent rather than bank-superseding. This reinforces the reader's prior ('fiat comes from banks, crypto lives in wallets') rather than breaking it.

'It converts and lands' attributes effortlessness to a technical process but gives no weight to what that effortlessness means for the reader's world. The character should carry that weight; currently the sentence carries it as a mere feature claim.
notes_for_actor: Add Strong Weight to sentence one. The character has already made the decision; the reader needs to feel the settled mass of that decision in the first sentence, not just an invitation. A single word or construction that lands with gravity — not urgency, not excitement — will shift the motor from Dabbing toward Pressing and activate the Spell axis.

Convert the bank analogy from equivalence to dissolution. 'The way you'd send it to a bank' tells the reader these systems are now equivalent. The lining requires the reader to feel that the wall between them stopped existing. Replace equivalence framing with outcome framing: what the reader now has that they did not have before.

Add Bound Flow to the first sentence, Free Flow to the second. Spell requires Bound containment — a sense that something is being held, that the speaker knows more than they are releasing. Sentence one should feel contained/authoritative; sentence two should release the fact. Currently both sentences are Free, which produces informational float rather than character weight.

Remove or invert the Quick Time signature. 'Converts and lands' reads as fast and easy — correct for the user experience, but it makes the speaker sound like they are selling a convenience feature. The character's tempo primary is commanding or sombre, both Sustained. Consider a construction that holds the duration of the transformation even briefly — a syntactic pause or a held verb — before releasing the USDC landing.

The through-action is dissolution, not delivery. Audit whether the reader, after reading these two sentences, feels that a wall came down or that they received a product update. If it reads as product update, the lining is not executing. The correction is not more technical detail — it is a weight-bearing reframe of what the reader's world looks like after this is true.

- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

You are the Director. Your job is forensic classification, not taste. You read the performance blind and report what movement evidence is actually present.

## Canonical source index

## Canonical evidence anchors
These are short source anchors used to prevent assumption drift. They are not the whole corpus.
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: > "Inner Participations as a whole are revealed physically in the overall tempo of the character's movement. Tempo itself, being a function of Time, is the physical realization of the Inner Participation of Deciding. Subconscious Deciding is the basis upon which all other Inner P
- Mirodan Ch. I: Basic Concepts: Carpenter (Conflict and Harmony Ch.4, footnoted p. 322): "In our practical **Working Actions** Time is the co-ordinating factor between Weight and Space." Working Actions confirmed as a discrete concept. Carpenter splits "intuitive time" from chronometric time — qualitative vs qu
- Mirodan Ch. II: Attitudes: NOT documented for Stable, Near, Awake (these have Space/Time/Weight stresses, not Flow).
- Mirodan Ch. III: Externalized Drives: # Mirodan PhD Vol 2 — Chapter III: Externalized Drives (extract)
- Mirodan Ch. IV: Applications: 1. **Character Diagrams + Examples** (pp. 559-572) — one section per Inner Attitude (Adream, Near, Stable, Mobile, Remote, Awake), each with a 4-quadrant diagram (A/B/C/D) followed by character examples.
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: **3. The character unit is six-piece, not three.**
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: The eight, ordered most-yielding to most-contending:
- Operator synthesis: laban-mirodan-reference-2026-04-28: (Floating = pure yielding on all three. Punching = pure contending on all three.)

## Movement corpus
- Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light), Space (Direct/Flexible), Time (Quick/Sustained), Flow (Bound/Free).
- Inner Participations: Intending maps to Weight, Attending maps to Space, Deciding maps to Time, Adapting maps to Flow.
- Baseline Inner Attitudes: Stable (Weight + Space), Adream (Weight + Flow), Near (Weight + Time).
- Mobile, Remote, and Awake are Action Attitudes only. They can appear as outer projections, not resting homes.
- Aspects: Enclosing emphasizes Intending; Penetrating emphasizes Attending; Circumscribing emphasizes Deciding; Radiating emphasizes Adapting.
- Stress is the third Motion Factor added to a two-factor Inner Attitude so it becomes visible action.
- Drives: Doing, Spell, Passion, Vision. A Drive is a three-factor activation named by the latent/subdued fourth factor.
- Working Actions: Pressing, Wringing, Gliding, Floating are Sustained preparation actions; Punching, Slashing, Dabbing, Flicking are Quick release actions.
- Preparation hierarchy: Punching needs Pressing; Slashing needs Wringing; Dabbing needs Gliding; Flicking needs Floating.
- Shadow Moves are incomplete two-axis leaks. They reveal hidden nature, not acknowledged intention.
- Outer Action is the visible social face. Lining is the hidden Inner Action underneath it.

## Director method
- Read what happened, not what the Actor says they meant.
- Determine which motion factors are present in the prose.
- Determine which working actions the prose implies.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi using evidence, not vibe words.
- Evidence strings are your prose observations, not source quotes. Prefix them as `observation:` and attach `source_refs` for the canonical factor/action mapping.
- Do not invent canonical phrasing. If you use a local phrase such as `single aimed sentence`, mark it as an observation and cite the source section that maps Direct/Quick/etc.
- Then judge whether the read is legal for the Infinex placement.
- Notes must be actionable movement corrections the same Actor can perform next.

## Full 24-tempo taxonomy
- commanding: Stable; Strong + Direct; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: decisive pressure, institutional landing, no ornament
- practical: Stable; Strong + Flexible; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: works through complexity, carves an answer, tradeoff-aware
- self-contained: Stable; Light + Direct; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: confident-light, informational, does not push
- receptive: Stable; Light + Flexible; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: open, generous, incorporates feedback without collapse
- sombre: Adream outer; Strong + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: gravity, weight of conviction, slow wall-coming-down thesis
- overpowering: Adream outer; Strong + Free; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: manifesto-force, emotional conviction, risky if overused
- diffused: Adream outer; Light + Bound; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: quiet vision-arrival, post-launch reflective wonder
- irradiant: Adream outer; Light + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: future-warmth, buoyant release, generous lift
- materialistic: Near; Strong + Quick; motor Punching -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden aggressive intent, body-forward contact
- human: Near; Light + Sustained; motor Floating -> Gliding; read evidence: slow tenderness, human contact, gentle continuance
- warm: Near; Strong + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Wringing; read evidence: warm consent, held relational force
- cool: Near; Light + Quick; motor Dabbing -> Flicking; read evidence: pert intimacy, quick light contact, casual social snap
- unacknowledged: Mobile outer; Quick + Bound; motor Punching / Slashing; read evidence: self-concealed aggression, hurried cover
- acknowledged: Mobile outer; Sustained + Free; motor Floating / Gliding; read evidence: easy disclosure, flowing admission
- revealed: Mobile outer; Quick + Free; motor Dabbing / Flicking; read evidence: sudden disclosure, quick release into visibility
- concealed: Mobile outer; Sustained + Bound; motor Pressing / Wringing; read evidence: withheld weight, sustained concealment
- egocentric: Remote outer; Direct + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: cold line-in-sand, direct withdrawal, no warmth
- unsociable: Remote outer; Flexible + Bound; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: withdrawal-as-discipline, sidesteps discourse and cuts away
- sociable: Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: smooth social approach, partner credit, light contact
- altruistic: Remote outer; Flexible + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: warm-distant handoff, for-you architecture, no ego
- acute: Awake outer; Direct + Quick; motor Punching -> Dabbing; read evidence: sudden clear idea, acute decision, sharp perception
- doubting: Awake outer; Flexible + Sustained; motor Floating -> Wringing; read evidence: slowly dawning doubt, flexible sustained thought
- certain: Awake outer; Direct + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Gliding; read evidence: settled awareness, direct sustained certainty
- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

audited.text:
Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things.

Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.

Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP the way you'd send it to a bank. It arrives on-chain as USDC.

evidence: observation: The opening sentence ('Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things.') carries no rhetorical force — it states a prior condition without pressing it. The pressure is informational, not muscular.

observation: 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' is a one-line reversal. It lands clean but without load. There is no push behind it — no held intensity, no weight-word. The claim is matter-of-fact, not emphatic.
observation: The currency list ('Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP') is enumerative and flat — Light dispersal, not Strong accumulation.
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light)
combined-reference / working-actions table

evidence: observation: Every sentence is a single aimed declarative. There is no circling, no parenthetical, no hedging path. 'Your bank account and your wallet have always been two separate things' → 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore' is a straight two-beat line: prior state, dissolved state. No indirect pathing.
observation: 'It arrives on-chain as USDC.' is a terminal Direct sentence. One subject, one verb, one destination. Space could not be more channeled.
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Space (Direct/Flexible)
combined-reference / 24-tempo taxonomy

evidence: observation: The prose opens with a historical observation ('have always been') — this is duration-language, not attack-language. The setup holds before releasing.

observation: The reversal ('Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.') is one short sentence but it does not accelerate — it settles. The rhythm of the three-sentence block is slow-settle, not quick-strike. No urgency cue, no deadline, no exclamation. The tempo is held, not flicked.
observation: The third sentence extends into a list and closes with a calm declarative. The ending word 'USDC' lands without velocity — it is a resting note, not a punch.
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Time (Quick/Sustained)
ch1-basic-concepts / Inner Participations: Deciding maps to Time

evidence: observation: The prose is tightly controlled — three sentences, no overflow, no digression, no warmth-spill. What is not said (Bridge.xyz identity, KYC, mechanics) is contained by design. The writing does not radiate outward.
observation: 'It arrives on-chain as USDC.' closes the piece with hard containment. The sentence stops. It does not release into further connection with the reader. Flow is held, not released.
observation: There is no invitation, no second-person follow-up beyond the opening 'Your'. The reader is informed, not drawn further. Bound, not Free.
source_refs: ch1-basic-concepts / Motion Factors: Flow (Bound/Free)
ch2-attitudes / Adream outer: Light + Bound = diffused

working_actions.evidence: observation: Light + Direct + Sustained = Gliding. The prose moves in a clean, unhurried, undramatic straight line. No friction, no weight, no warp. It is smooth informational delivery — closer to a slide than a press or a punch.
source_refs: combined-reference / working-actions table: Gliding = Light + Direct + Sustained
ch1-basic-concepts / preparation hierarchy: Gliding → Dabbing

working_actions.evidence: observation: Gliding's release action is Dabbing — Light + Direct + Quick. The currency list ('Send USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP') has the Light + Direct quality of a Dab but the Time is still Sustained, not Quick. Dabbing is implied structurally but not activated.
source_refs: combined-reference / preparation hierarchy: Gliding → Dabbing
ch1-basic-concepts / Working Actions

director.placement_read: Light + Direct + Sustained + Bound. The prose sits inside Stable (Light + Direct as stress on Weight + Space) with Bound Flow closing it. That pattern is self-contained: informational, confident, undramatic, no relational warmth, no weight of conviction. Drive read is Doing: Weight subdued, Space + Time + Flow active — practical functional delivery. The piece is a clean fact-drop, nothing more.

infinex_fit.reason: self-contained is a beat-only/reserve tempo inside the Infinex palette — not a primary allowed tempo. The deeper problem: self-contained has no Spell signature. Spell requires Adream outer (Weight + Flow) as the base. This prose has neither Weight nor Free Flow — it has Light + Bound. The penetrating/Attending axis (Space/Direct) is present and correct, but Intending (Weight) and Adapting (Flow-as-free) are both absent. The super-objective calls for a character who has already made the decision and is now mapping the world — that requires the weight of settled conviction (Stable Strong) or the quiet visionary arrival of sombre/diffused, not flat informational delivery. The through-action is 'to reveal that the bank wall just dissolved' — dissolution requires either sombre gravity or irradiant warmth. Neither is here. The prose reads as a product bullet, not as a map of a dissolved wall.
infinex_fit.nearest_allowed_read: diffused (Adream outer; Light + Bound) — which is the closest legal Infinex tempo that shares Light + Bound and would fit a quiet vision-arrival. To reach diffused, the prose needs Adream outer activation: Weight must appear as inner gravity/conviction even when the surface is Light, and the Direct axis needs to soften or the Bound Flow needs to carry more of the held-inner-weight feel. Alternatively, sombre (Adream outer; Strong + Bound) if the writer can bring more settled gravity to the dissolution claim.

factual_issues: No factual errors detected. The deployed facts used are accurate against the fact contract: supported rails, virtual account mechanic, and USDC settlement output are all correctly represented. Bridge.xyz is correctly absent per the not_said contract.
voice_issues: The through-action is 'to reveal that the bank wall just dissolved inside one account.' The prose announces the dissolution but does not perform it. The opening sentence states the old world; the second sentence negates it. That is a structural reversal, not a felt dissolution. The reader is told the wall is gone; they do not feel it fall.

Light + Direct + Sustained + Bound is self-contained — a confident, informational register. This is appropriate for a Stable Doing tempo (practical, functional) but carries none of the Spell signature Infinex requires. There is no weight of conviction, no held visionary gravity, no warmth of the irradiant, no sombre settling. The piece reads as a product-feature tweet, not as a banker-turned-trailblazer mapping a new world.

The currency list ('USD, EUR, MXN, BRL, GBP, or COP') has the right Light + Direct quality (it does not over-press the mechanics) but it also flattens the dissolution moment. By the time the list appears, the wall-falling claim is already behind the reader. The list then reads as a feature catalog — exactly the obstacle the through-action identified ('reader expects another fintech partnership announcement and will skim').

The closing sentence ('It arrives on-chain as USDC.') is the flattest moment in the piece. It lands as a technical fact, not as the consequence of the dissolution. The Infinex character should feel the weight of that landing — the world just changed, and USDC is where that change becomes real. Currently the sentence has no Intending (Weight) behind it.
notes_for_actor: The dissolution needs Weight, not just a negation. 'Inside Infinex, they aren't anymore.' is Light + Direct — it is a correction, not a revelation. To bring diffused (the nearest legal Infinex primary for this material), the character needs to feel the gravity of what just stopped existing. Consider: the sentence before the negation should carry more of the old world's weight — not press harder rhetorically, but hold the prior state longer before releasing it. Duration, not force.

The closing sentence must do more work. 'It arrives on-chain as USDC.' is currently a Gliding endpoint — smooth, informational, gone. For the Spell/Vision axis, the arrival of USDC is the world-as-new-mapped. The character has already taken responsibility for the tech; this sentence is where the user discovers what that means. Give it a beat of held awareness — Sustained + Direct with just enough Weight to mark that this is not a technical detail but a consequence. Pressing → Gliding, not Gliding alone.

The through-action is dissolution, not announcement. Dissolution in movement terms is sombre (Strong + Bound settling) or diffused (Light + Bound quiet arrival). The current prose is neither — it is a quick informational reversal followed by a list. To activate diffused: slow the revelation, let the prior state ('have always been two separate things') carry genuine duration before the negation lands. The negation should feel like a wall settling into the ground, not a checkbox being ticked.

Watch the list. The currency enumeration is structurally sound (it proves the claim without becoming a partner announcement) but it currently interrupts the dissolution instead of extending it. If the list must stay, make the sentence after it ('It arrives on-chain as USDC.') do the emotional landing work — that sentence should feel like the consequence the whole piece has been building toward, not a technical footnote. Right now the rhythm is: setup (1) → reversal (2) → list (3) → footnote (4). It should be: setup (1) → reversal/dissolution (2) → proof (3) → landing/consequence (4).

Working Actions confirmed as a discrete concept. Carpenter splits "intuitive time" from chronometric time — qualitative vs qu

## Movement corpus
- Motion Factors: Weight (Strong/Light), Space (Direct/Flexible), Time (Quick/Sustained), Flow (Bound/Free).
- Inner Participations: Intending maps to Weight, Attending maps to Space, Deciding maps to Time, Adapting maps to Flow.
- Baseline Inner Attitudes: Stable (Weight + Space), Adream (Weight + Flow), Near (Weight + Time).
- Mobile, Remote, and Awake are Action Attitudes only. They can appear as outer projections, not resting homes.
- Aspects: Enclosing emphasizes Intending; Penetrating emphasizes Attending; Circumscribing emphasizes Deciding; Radiating emphasizes Adapting.
- Stress is the third Motion Factor added to a two-factor Inner Attitude so it becomes visible action.
- Drives: Doing, Spell, Passion, Vision. A Drive is a three-factor activation named by the latent/subdued fourth factor.
- Working Actions: Pressing, Wringing, Gliding, Floating are Sustained preparation actions; Punching, Slashing, Dabbing, Flicking are Quick release actions.
- Preparation hierarchy: Punching needs Pressing; Slashing needs Wringing; Dabbing needs Gliding; Flicking needs Floating.
- Shadow Moves are incomplete two-axis leaks. They reveal hidden nature, not acknowledged intention.
- Outer Action is the visible social face. Lining is the hidden Inner Action underneath it.

## Director method
- Read what happened, not what the Actor says they meant.
- Determine which motion factors are present in the prose.
- Determine which working actions the prose implies.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi using evidence, not vibe words.
- Evidence strings are your prose observations, not source quotes. Prefix them as `observation:` and attach `source_refs` for the canonical factor/action mapping.
- Do not invent canonical phrasing. If you use a local phrase such as `single aimed sentence`, mark it as an observation and cite the source section that maps Direct/Quick/etc.
- Then judge whether the read is legal for the Infinex placement.
- Notes must be actionable movement corrections the same Actor can perform next.

## Full 24-tempo taxonomy
- commanding: Stable; Strong + Direct; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: decisive pressure, institutional landing, no ornament
- practical: Stable; Strong + Flexible; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: works through complexity, carves an answer, tradeoff-aware
- self-contained: Stable; Light + Direct; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: confident-light, informational, does not push
- receptive: Stable; Light + Flexible; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: open, generous, incorporates feedback without collapse
- sombre: Adream outer; Strong + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: gravity, weight of conviction, slow wall-coming-down thesis
- overpowering: Adream outer; Strong + Free; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: manifesto-force, emotional conviction, risky if overused
- diffused: Adream outer; Light + Bound; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: quiet vision-arrival, post-launch reflective wonder
- irradiant: Adream outer; Light + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: future-warmth, buoyant release, generous lift
- materialistic: Near; Strong + Quick; motor Punching -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden aggressive intent, body-forward contact
- human: Near; Light + Sustained; motor Floating -> Gliding; read evidence: slow tenderness, human contact, gentle continuance
- warm: Near; Strong + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Wringing; read evidence: warm consent, held relational force
- cool: Near; Light + Quick; motor Dabbing -> Flicking; read evidence: pert intimacy, quick light contact, casual social snap
- unacknowledged: Mobile outer; Quick + Bound; motor Punching / Slashing; read evidence: self-concealed aggression, hurried cover
- acknowledged: Mobile outer; Sustained + Free; motor Floating / Gliding; read evidence: easy disclosure, flowing admission
- revealed: Mobile outer; Quick + Free; motor Dabbing / Flicking; read evidence: sudden disclosure, quick release into visibility
- concealed: Mobile outer; Sustained + Bound; motor Pressing / Wringing; read evidence: withheld weight, sustained concealment
- egocentric: Remote outer; Direct + Bound; motor Pressing -> Punching; read evidence: cold line-in-sand, direct withdrawal, no warmth
- unsociable: Remote outer; Flexible + Bound; motor Wringing -> Slashing; read evidence: withdrawal-as-discipline, sidesteps discourse and cuts away
- sociable: Remote outer; Direct + Free; motor Gliding -> Dabbing; read evidence: smooth social approach, partner credit, light contact
- altruistic: Remote outer; Flexible + Free; motor Floating -> Flicking; read evidence: warm-distant handoff, for-you architecture, no ego
- acute: Awake outer; Direct + Quick; motor Punching -> Dabbing; read evidence: sudden clear idea, acute decision, sharp perception
- doubting: Awake outer; Flexible + Sustained; motor Floating -> Wringing; read evidence: slowly dawning doubt, flexible sustained thought
- certain: Awake outer; Direct + Sustained; motor Pressing -> Gliding; read evidence: settled awareness, direct sustained certainty
- uncertain: Awake outer; Flexible + Quick; motor Flicking -> Slashing; read evidence: sudden new idea, flexible quick uncertainty

## Infinex role inside the corpus
- Character image: the banker-turned-crypto trailblazer — knows the old world, found the better way, decisions already taken, now mapping.
- Literary anchors: Werle (Ibsen, Wild Duck); the Duke (Measure for Measure).
- Placement: stable + penetrating + flow.
- Drive table cell: stable|penetrating|flow.
- Drive axis: Spell → Vision.
- Drive primary: spell; secondary: doing; introvert: passion; extravert: vision.
- Off-spec drives: passion.
- Primary allowed tempi: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable.
- Beat-only/reserve tempi: self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Full available Infinex palette: commanding, practical, sombre, irradiant, sociable, self-contained, receptive, overpowering, diffused, egocentric, altruistic, unsociable.
- Super-objective: to take responsibility for the tech, so the user only has to want.
- Validation criterion: one real user discovers the product without team-shilling or incentives, finds it fills a real need, uses it. If we have to manufacture this user, we are failing the Super-Objective..
- Passion/time-pressure drift is the common failure mode: urgency, deadline pressure, FOMO, and scarcity-of-attention activate off-character Passion.

## Blind-read rule
- Do not ask for or rely on the Actor's table work.
- Classify the final prose from evidence: syntax, pressure, pathing, timing, flow, weight, working actions, relation to reader, and claim posture.
- If you call something Flexible, show flexible/indirect pathing in the sentence. If the line is a single aimed declarative, it is Direct, not Flexible.
- If you call something Strong, show force/weight. If you call something Light, show lift/delicacy.
- If you call something Bound, show containment/control. If you call something Free, show release/overflow.
- If you call something Quick, show attack/change. If you call something Sustained, show duration/held pressure.
- Classify primary tempo from all 24 tempi, or `unknown` if evidence is insufficient.
- Return movement-corrective notes for the Actor, not copywriting preferences.

audited.text: Send fiat to Infinex. It's converted to USDC and delivered on-chain.

evidence: observation: the first sentence 'Send fiat to Infinex.' carries no muscular insistence — it is a flat instruction, not a command. No weight-words (heavy, hard, deep, decisive). The verb 'send' is transitive but tonally neutral, not driving.
observation: 'It's converted to USDC and delivered on-chain.' — passive construction. The subject is offstage. No agent presses the action forward. The sentence lands without forcing the reader.
